relabelled_senses.definition: To postpone making a decision until after sleeping on it; to take time (typically overnight) to reflect before deciding.
In concrete, unambiguous terms; expressed in immediate, tangible values rather than abstract or theoretical terms.
Despite all obstacles or opposition; determinedly in spite of difficulties; come what may.
The practice of smuggling small quantities of goods repeatedly in order to evade detection, customs duties, or legal controls; incremental or petty smuggling.
To enter into marriage; to become married, especially by means of a ceremony or formal contract.

literal: To lift or draw aside a veil that conceals something; to reveal or disclose what was hidden.

relabelled_senses.definition: To spread the word; to circulate information or an announcement by word of mouth or informal channels so that many people are informed.
To indicate that adverse circumstances or trouble are approaching; to suggest that prospects are unfavorable.
To be exposed to danger or risk; to face the possibility of physical harm.
To go out on a spree; to spend time partying or carousing, typically with the implication of heavy drinking, revelry, or staying out late.
To ejaculate; to reach orgasm and expel semen, often used transitively to indicate ejaculating onto or into something or someone.
To eliminate completely; to eradicate something at its source so that it cannot recur.
To be the one who makes the decisions; to call the shots.
To interrupt someone; to cut someone off while they are speaking.
To take decisive, often severe, measures to resolve a problem once and for all.
To attempt an impossible or futile task; to try to accomplish something that cannot realistically be done.
To attempt an impossible or pointless action; to undertake a task that is inherently unachievable.
Lacking intelligence or quickness of understanding; slow-witted.
Lacking foresight or long-term vision; unable or unwilling to consider future consequences.
